args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)

WHERE toLower(aas.idShort) CONTAINS 'hall 4' OR toLower(aas.idShort) CONTAINS 'transport' OR toLower(sm.idShort) CONTAINS 'transport'
